Chat Edit: ' audit logs (RawrXD needs telemetry export)
 Cursor's agentic composer UI (RawrXD has DualAgent but needs UX polish) - Add Full Agentic Audit/UX Polish
 Cursor's context @-mentions (RawrXD has LSP bridge but no @-parser) - Add Parser/s
 Cursor image inputs (RawrXD has VisionEncoder but not wired to UI) - Wire completely to UI/UX
 200+ automated refactorings (RawrXD has SmartRewriteEngine but narrower) - ADD only those needed but make this pluginable/extensionable
 JB supports 60+ languages deeply (RawrXD: ASM, C++, Python, JS) - ADD only those needed but make this pluginable/extensionable
 Truffle/Graal semantic index (RawrXD has SymbolIndex but smaller scale)
 resource generation (RawrXD has no cloud provisioning) - ADD only those needed but make this pluginable/extensionable
 '

Chat Edit: 'Please continue forward fillinal all missing logic with the next logical steps filling in any prior scaffolding ? - todos - plan decomposition - 7 AI systems - agent orchestration - tools - ? to continue finishing instead of conscructing more scaffolding! Acknowledged. Stopping scaffolding, starting implementation! Only closure.'
